headline: Surging Earnings Estimates Signal Upside for DaVita HealthCare (DVA) Stock
summary: DaVita HealthCare (DVA) shares have started gaining and might continue moving higher in the near term, as indicated by solid earnings estimate revisions.

headline: Truist Securities Maintains Hold on DaVita, Raises Price Target to $205
summary: Truist Securities  analyst David Macdonald   maintains DaVita (NYSE:DVA) with a Hold and raises the price target from $158 to $205.
